user.title: Traeger Cook Guide
user.description:
Click **Submit** to install.

This will automatically:
- Copy the interactive cook guide to your www folder
- Create all 14 required helpers (4 probes + pit control)
- Create all 18 automations (per-probe alerts + pit drift)

After install, you'll get a notification with the one dashboard card YAML to paste.

Requires a Govee H5198 thermometer already set up in Home Assistant.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already installed. Only one instance is supported.
